CloudHan Electronics Co., Ltd., a KRX-listed issuer based in Gumi, provides this Privacy Notice under the Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA) and the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act (FSCMA).
PII means information about a living individual that identifies them directly or in combination; MNPI means important information not yet publicly disclosed through DART, KRX, or press releases.
We process employee, applicant, contractor, and investor contact data (names, business emails, role titles, work history), and we avoid collecting resident-registration numbers unless required by law; any form field shows “000000-0000000 (example only).”
For payroll and benefits we may collect bank account labels and masked numbers (e.g., 123-45-***-*****-00, example only) and emergency contact names provided by the data subject.
Our Han River Harmony DEI Charter and NebulaGlass product feedback programs may mention inclusion goals, workplace culture, and generic wellness tips, but do not require or record union, religion, politics, or health details.
Intentional exception (special category): for Employee ID E-11245 assigned to the Fab 3 secure zone, we store a biometric door-access template and entry logs with explicit consent and separate encryption keys.
Investor Relations processes only public or already-announced facts for Q&A and roadshows, and we prohibit the storage of MNPI in IR, HR, or marketing tools; any MNPI for transactions is confined to a segregated compliance workspace under FSC/FSS guidance.
Disclosures may be made to GumiPay Services Ltd. (payroll), HanCloud Hosting KK (intra-group cloud in Tokyo), and regulators (FSC, FSS, KRX Market Oversight) where legally mandated; cross-border transfers use standard transfer agreements and opt-in notices where required.
Retention: personnel files 5 years post-termination; access-control logs 6 months; trade surveillance and insider list archives 10 years under FSCMA; investor email preferences retained until opt-out.
Security measures include role-based access, encryption at rest, HSM-backed keys, and quarterly audits; our “Blue Crane Playbook” is a policy name for security awareness, not a monitoring tool.
Data subject rights: you may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction via the Data Rights Desk at privacy@cloudhan.example or https://privacy.cloudhan.example; we respond within statutory time limits.
To verify identity we may request an employee ID and masked resident-number fragments (e.g., **-*******), which are checked against HR records and then discarded.
We do not use automated decision making for hiring or promotion; phrases like “full-court press” in training slides are sports metaphors and have no profiling effect.
This notice does not constitute investment advice, does not announce earnings, and does not modify obligations under the FSCMA; questions for investors may be sent to ir@cloudhan.example.
